name: Aphrodite
description: Aphrodite is the Greek goddess of beauty.

name: Arshes Nei
description: A half-elf born to a human and Dark Elf. Known as the “Empress of Thunder,” she is a magic swordsman who casts lightning spells. A war orphan picked up by Dark Schneider, she was once like his daughter and lover, but now she is an adversary, being one of the Four Divine Kings of the Dark Rebel Armies.

name: Buwei Lü
description: A merchant who ranked up as Qin's Right Chancellor. ~!Shortly after he is introduced, it is revealed that he is planning to keep his army in Wei until Zheng Ying dies, then storm Qin's capital of Xianyang, denouncing Jiao Cheng as a tyrant and taking the throne for himself. !~

name: Chitose Shirakawa
description: She is the girlfriend of Itsuki Akazawa. An active and light-headed person, Chitose is extremely honest with her words. Thanks to her energetic personality, she was able to befriend Mahiru Shiina and allow her to show her true personality more.

name: Elaine Lo Po Bia
description: Lo Po Bia Elaine (로 포 비아 엘레인, Lo Po Bia Ellein) formerly known as Kaiser the Name Hunter (이름 사냥꾼 카이저, ileum sanyangkkun kaijeo; "Name Hunter Kaiser") is a Regular who acted as the ruler of the third station of the Hell Train located on the 39th Floor, Name Hunt, for over a thousand years on behalf of her family. She is one of the 3 top D-rank Regulars.

name: Gakuhou Asano
description: He is the board chairman and administrative head of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He has made the academy into the foremost in Japan in the ten years since its founding. Gakuhō is a reasonable, prudent, and shrewd individual; he is primarily known for his cool-headed rationalism. He is a proponent of logic and efficiency, and handles matters accordingly. An able and competent administrator, he is resolved in removing factors that may upset the intended balance.

name: Gori
description: A gorilla lady who works as director of marketing at Retsuko's company. She is also a friend of Retsuko.

name: Hiiro Amagi
description: __Unit:__ ALKALOID __Club:__ Karate Club __Circles:__ SHIN, Keito Lecture A newcomer who has no knowledge whatsoever about the idol industry, yet aims to be an idol. He has an optimistic, naïve personality, and he tends to overdo it with how passionate he is. He is Rinne Amagi's younger brother. He has a side of him that causes him to get ahead of himself and follow his emotions over logic. He sings from the heart, making his performances powerful and clear. Jurai is a goofy boy. Due to his Chunin Syndrome, he often falls into a world of his own, causing annoyance to those around him. name: Karen Kamiya
description: Karen Kamiya is the dedicated secretary of Shota Doi and the Minister of Public Welfare in the UW Japan Branch.

name: Lilith
description: ~!One of the six satellites of [Dr. Vegapunk](https://anilist.co/character/282077), embodying his aspect of "evil".!~

name: Masato Inohara
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6') Masato is a member of the Little Busters, and is Riki's roommate. He loves to work out and improve his muscle mass. His rival is Kengo Miyazawa, fellow member of the Little Busters. ~!In the artificial world, he supports Kyousuke's plan to strengthen both Riki and Rin to overcome the events in the real world. He saves Riki during the bus accident.!~

name: Matsu
description: A computer genius and hacker that lives in a secret room of Izumo Inn, and was once mistaken for a ghost by Kusano. She becomes Minato's third Sekirei. She also likes to shorten people's names and substitute tan for san. Matsu uses a vast network of satellites and spying devices to gather large amounts of information and has even succeeded in hacking the MBI mainframe computer. name: Mo-Ri Hui
description: ~!Hui Mo-Ri was the main protagonist of G.O.H season 4 and the first-half of season 5, and was also the clone created by Jin Mo-Ri to go to the Human Realm with his gourd. As time went on he would become less of Jin Mo-Ri's clone and discover his true self.!~

name: Moja
description: Moja is an employee of the Mononokean and is the very first yokai Hanae encountered.

name: Nanase Katagiri
description: The most charismatic and popular "slut" of the school. There are a lot of rumors of Nanase being an uncontrollable sex queen, but in reality Nanase is a virgin and people base everything on her looks. She often uses this to her advantage when attempting to escape.
